# Clinical Studies with Survival Outcomes

::: {.callout-note}
## Drafting note
Chapter content in progress. Migrate the corresponding text here; use `$...$` / `$$...$$` for math, place figures in `images/`, and use ```{r} or ```{python} code blocks.
:::

## The proportional hazards assumption

_To be added._

## Cox regression under non-proportional hazards

_To be added._

## Cox regression with time-dependent covariates

_To be added._

## Competing risks models

_To be added._

## Limitations of the hazard ratio

_To be added._
